biography: Erik is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, known for his calm demeanor and meticulous approach to the game. Representing Ruukkigolf, Erik has twice graced the fairways of this prestigious tournament, bringing a quiet intensity to the competition.

While the coveted Hector Trophée and the individual Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, Erik's dedication to the sport is undeniable. Those who have played alongside him describe Erik as a thoughtful competitor, always analyzing the course and strategizing his next move with a patient resolve.
Although Erik is not expected to participate in Hector Trophée 2026, his presence is missed, and fans will be hoping to see him back on the course in future events.
